info.title: HotelBooking API
info.description: REST API for the HotelBooking application — browse hotels, manage listings, make bookings, and get personalised recommendations.

tags.name: Hotels
tags.description: Hotel listings, search, reviews, and classification.

tags.name: Recommendations
tags.description: Personalised hotel recommendations via collaborative filtering.

post.description: Invalidate user session and clear cookies
Refresh access token using refresh token from cookie
Send reset password email to user

message.example: Reset password email was successfully sent!

post.description: Reset user password using token from email

get.description: Get Google OAuth URL for client redirection

post.description: Exchange OAuth code for session (access token). Query param code expected.

200.description: Successfully logged in via Google OAuth

message.example: Successfully logged in via Google OAuth!

get.description: Returns a paginated list of hotels. Supports full-text search by title or location and filtering by guest capacity.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field name to sort results by (e.g. price, title, createdAt)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Full-text search query (matches hotel title or location, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: guests
parameters.description: Filter hotels that can accommodate at least this many guests (maxGuests >= guests)

post.description: Creates a new hotel listing. Requires authentication. Image must be uploaded as multipart/form-data.

description.example: A luxury hotel in the heart of Vienna with stunning views of the Ringstrasse boulevard.

image.description: Hotel cover image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP)

get.description: Returns all hotel listings created by the currently authenticated user, sorted by creation date (newest first).
Returns top 10 hotels ranked by average rating, cleanliness score, and location score.
Returns a single hotel with all details including reviews and ratings summary.

patch.description: Partially updates a hotel listing. Requires authentication. Only the hotel owner can update it. Image upload is optional.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the hotel to update

description.example: Newly renovated luxury hotel in the heart of Vienna.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a hotel listing. Requires authentication. Only the hotel owner can delete it.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the hotel to delete

post.summary: Add a review to a hotel
post.description: Adds a guest review to a hotel. Automatically recalculates the hotel's ratings summary (average rating, cleanliness, location scores). Requires authentication.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the hotel to review

text.example: Excellent hotel with outstanding service and a perfect location near the city center.

post.description: Creates a new hotel booking. Requires authentication. Guest name, email, and contact details are required.

hotelId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the hotel to book

get.description: Returns all bookings made by the currently authenticated user, sorted by check-in date ascending.
Returns all bookings for a specific hotel, sorted by check-in date ascending. Public endpoint — used for availability calendar.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user. Password is never included in the response.
Returns personalized hotel recommendations for the current user based on collaborative filtering (cosine similarity with other users' booking patterns). Requires authentication.

parameters.name: topN
parameters.description: Number of top recommendations to return

text.example: Great hotel, very clean and perfectly located in the city center.

description.example: A luxury hotel in the heart of Vienna with stunning views of the Ringstrasse boulevard.

specialRequests.example: Late check-in please, allergic to feathers.

description.example: A luxury hotel in the heart of Vienna.

similarity.description: Cosine similarity score (0–1) used for ranking recommendations

data.description: Error object produced by http-errors (may contain name, message, details, etc.)

example.message: You can only edit your own listings

data.description: Error object produced by http-errors (may contain name, message, details, etc.)

409.description: Conflict — resource already exists (Email in use)

data.description: Error object produced by http-errors (may contain name, message, details, etc.)
